summary: Ukrainian forces reported multiple drone and missile attacks across the front, including a missile strike in Voronezh that killed five and extensive drone activity over Russian territory. Ground fighting continued with modest advances of a few hundred meters in Sumy and Kharkiv directions. Civilian casualties rose after attacks in Kryvyi Rih and Odessa.
key_points: A missile strike on a factory in Voronezh killed five people and injured dozens (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/31105).
The Russian Ministry of Defense reported shooting down 141 Ukrainian drones over the past day (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/31105).
Ukrainian forces advanced up to 400 meters in the Sumy direction, occupying over 18 houses (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/31105).
Three civilians were killed and 23 injured in a Russian rocket attack on Kryvyi Rih (Source: @UkraineNow/82131).
A Russian drone attack on a bus in Belgorod region killed the driver (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/31105).
Ukrainian UAVs attacked a Russian energy facility in Zaporozhye, causing a fire (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/31105).
A Russian drone launched from the Black Sea headed toward Odessa (Source: @kpszsu/66064).
Ukrainian forces reported intense fighting near Velyka Znamenka, Kamensko-Dneprovsky district, injuring a child (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/31105).

sections.executive_summary: Ukrainian forces intensified drone and missile operations, striking targets in Voronezh, Zaporozhye, and Belgorod, while Russian defenses claimed 141 UAVs shot down. Ground combat saw limited territorial gains of up to 400 meters in Sumy and Kharkiv sectors. Civilian casualties increased after attacks in Kryvyi Rih and Odessa.

points: Ukrainian forces reported a 400‑meter advance in the Sumy direction, occupying over 18 households and consolidating positions near Novoy Sech and Ivolzhanske (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/31105).
In the Kharkiv sector, assault troops advanced over 200 meters in Kozach Lopan, taking about 15 houses (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/31105).
Ukrainian UAVs struck a Russian factory in Voronezh, causing five fatalities and dozens of injuries (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/31105).
A Ukrainian drone attack on the Dubna space communications center in the Moscow region did not disrupt broadcasting (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/31105).
Ukrainian forces destroyed an earthen causeway across the Seversky Donets near Studenok, a key logistics element (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/31105).
Ukrainian attacks on the Russian merchant fleet in the Ukrainian maritime corridor were reported (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/31105).
Ukrainian forces reported intense fighting near Velyka Znamenka, Kamensko‑Dneprovsky district, where a child was injured by a UAV strike (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/31105).
The Russian Ministry of Defense reported shooting down 141 Ukrainian drones in a 24‑hour period (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/31105).
A Russian FPV drone attacked a bus on the Krasnaya Yaruga‑Vyazovoye road in Belgorod region, killing the driver (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/31105).
In Belgorod, an FPV drone struck a commercial facility in Shebekino, wounding a civilian (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/31105).
A Russian drone attack in the Kursk region hit an outbuilding in 1st Vygornoye, resulting in a civilian death from mine‑blast injuries (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/31105).
Russian forces reported the use of ballistic weapons from Millerovo and Kursk (Source: @kpszsu/66084, @kpszsu/66081).
A Russian UAV launched from the Black Sea was observed heading toward Odessa (Source: @kpszsu/66064).
Russian authorities announced the destruction of the railway bridge over the North‑Crimean Canal (Source: @eRadarrua/97873).
Ukrainian forces reported fighting near Pokrovka in the Krasnopollye district, advancing up to 400 meters (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/31105).
In the Kharkiv direction, intense combat continued near plantations of Pokalyane, Karaychnogo, and Volohovky (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/31105).
Ukrainian UAVs attacked a Russian energy facility in Zaporozhye, causing a fire (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/31105).
Russian forces claimed to have displayed flags while advancing through Krasny Liman, a city with prolonged fighting (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/31105).
Ukrainian attacks on civilian and freight vehicles in Prymorsk and Akimovsk districts resulted in two deaths (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/31105).
Ukrainian UAVs targeted the Dubna space communications center in the Moscow region without disrupting services (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/31105).
Ukrainian forces reported destroying a logistics causeway near Studenok, a key crossing over the Seversky Donets (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/31105).
Ukrainian UAV sightings were reported over northern Dnipropetrovsk heading toward Magdalynivka (Source: @kpszsu/66071).
A UAV was observed over Sumy heading toward Esman/Glukhov (Source: @kpszsu/66065).
Ukrainian forces reported infiltration into the Chervony district on the northern outskirts of Konstantinovka (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/31105).
Russian tactical aviation launched guided bombs on the city of Kharkiv (Source: @kpszsu/66100).
Ukrainian UAV activity was noted over Poltava region near Poltava and over Dnipropetrovsk near the Dnipro River from the south (Source: @eRadarrua/97868).
Ukrainian forces reported a small advance of up to 200 meters in Kozach Lopan, Kharkiv direction (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/31105).
Ukrainian UAVs were observed over the Black Sea heading toward Odessa (Source: @kpszsu/66064).
Three civilians were killed and 23 injured in a Russian rocket attack on Kryvyi Rih (Source: @UkraineNow/82131).
A Russian attack on the Odessa coast killed a 26‑year‑old woman and injured a 39‑year‑old man (Source: @UkraineNow/82132).
Ukrainian UAVs attacked a Russian bus in Belgorod region, killing the driver (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/31105).
Russian forces reported a fire at a merchant fleet target in the Ukrainian maritime corridor (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/31105).
Ukrainian UAVs struck a Russian factory in Voronezh, causing civilian casualties (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/31105).
Russian tactical aviation conducted guided‑bomb strikes on Kharkiv, indicating southern‑front air activity (Source: @kpszsu/66100).
Ukrainian forces reported intense fighting near Velyka Znamenka, Kamensko‑Dneprovsky district, with civilian injuries (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/31105).
The Russian MoD claimed 141 Ukrainian drones were shot down in the last 24 hours (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/31105).
Ukrainian UAVs attacked the Dubna space communications center in the Moscow region without disrupting broadcasts (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/31105).
Russian tactical aviation launched guided bombs on Kharkiv (Source: @kpszsu/66100).
Russian tactical aviation conducted guided‑bomb strikes on Donetsk region (Source: @kpszsu/66083).
Ukrainian UAVs were observed launching from the Black Sea toward Odessa (Source: @kpszsu/66064).
Ukrainian UAVs attacked a Russian factory in Voronezh, causing five deaths (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/31105).
Ukrainian UAVs targeted a Russian energy facility in Zaporozhye, igniting a fire (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/31105).

key_developments: Ukrainian UAV strike on a Voronezh factory killed five civilians, demonstrating deep‑strike capability (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/31105).
Russian Ministry of Defense reported downing 141 Ukrainian drones, indicating high UAV activity (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/31105).
Ukrainian ground forces advanced up to 400 meters in Sumy, occupying multiple houses (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/31105).
Three civilians killed and 23 injured in a Russian rocket attack on Kryvyi Rih, raising civilian risk (Source: @UkraineNow/82131).
Russian FPV drone attack on a Belgorod bus killed the driver, showing continued drone use against soft targets (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/31105).
Ukrainian UAVs destroyed a logistics causeway near Studenok, disrupting Russian supply lines (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/31105).
Russian tactical aviation launched guided bombs on Kharkiv, indicating escalation of air strikes (Source: @kpszsu/66100).
sections.threat_assessment: Ukrainian forces are leveraging UAVs for deep strikes, targeting infrastructure in Voronezh, Zaporozhye, and the Moscow region, while also achieving modest territorial gains on the ground. Russian defenses claim high interception rates but continue to suffer civilian casualties from Ukrainian attacks, especially in Kryvyi Rih and Odessa. The use of guided aerial bombs by Russian tactical aviation over Kharkiv and Donetsk suggests an intensifying air‑ground coordination, raising the risk of further civilian harm and logistical disruption.
sections.regional_response: Local authorities in Kryvyi Rih and Odessa reported casualties and are likely to request additional air‑defence assets and civil‑defence measures. Russian regional commands emphasized increased UAV counter‑measures, as noted by statements from the defence ministry. International observers may monitor the escalation of UAV use and its impact on civilian populations, potentially influencing diplomatic pressure.
sections.intelligence_notes: Continued monitoring of UAV launch points, especially from the Black Sea and northern Dnipropetrovsk, is essential for early warning. The reported destruction of the railway bridge over the North‑Crimean Canal could affect Russian logistics in Crimea. Russian statements about ballistic weapon threats from Millerovo and Kursk warrant attention for possible missile deployments. The modest ground advances indicate a focus on consolidating positions rather than large‑scale offensives at this stage.
